📄 About.txt
FileEditViewHelp

Nicole Teo

Hails from the sunny island of Singapore.

I am a growth marketer with experience across crypto, payments & e-commerce. I help startups find product-market fit in 0→1 environments and scale user growth from 1→100x.

Great marketing tells a story. I combine code, design, words, data, interactive media to tell the story of your brand and its products.

→ Publications & content archive

I live on the philosophy of action — knowledge learned through books or texts is best accompanied by action and experience.

Competitive footballer through high school & varsity. Touch rugby player. Avid gamer and mythology nerd.

STYLED WITH SASS · GENERATED IN JEKYLL · MADE IN NEW YORK

About.txtSingapore 🇸🇬

2015 – Present
Industry: B2B SaaS, Real Estate Target Audience: Office Managers, Coworking Space Owners, High Vistors Turnover Spaces Timeline: 3-6 months, August to December 2015 Value proposition: Unlock and s...
The Creative Room - Video Production Intern
2015 – Present
Before matriculating to college, I worked six months as an intern for a film and video production company, The Creative Room, in Singapore. In the first month, I felt like an awkward duck; I was th...
Doctor Who Poker Cards
2012 – Present
This poker card set consists of 54 cards (Including 2 Jokers) where they are packed and printed in clear plastic box. It was a pet project born out of my Whovian love.
